---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

<a href="CV_Jan Freihardt.pdf" class="cv-download-btn" download>
  ↓ Download CV (PDF)
</a>

## Current Position

**Postdoctoral Researcher** · Chair for International Political Economy and Environmental Politics, D-GESS, ETH Zurich (2025–present)

## Previous Positions

- Postdoctoral Researcher, Chair for Global Health Engineering, D-MAVT, ETH Zurich (2023–2025)
- Visiting Researcher, Climate School, Columbia University, New York (2023)

## Education

- **PhD** Political Science, Center for Comparative and International Studies (CIS), ETH Zurich (2023)
  Thesis: [*When the river breaks the land: Environmental (im)mobility among rural households in Bangladesh*](https://doi.org/10.3929/ethz-b-000646402)
  Committee: Prof. Dr. Vally Koubi, Prof. Dr. Lukas Rudolph, Dr. Alex de Sherbinin, Prof. Dr. Nina von Uexkull
- **M.Sc.** Science, Technology and Policy, ETH Zurich (2020)
- **M.Sc.** Environmental Engineering, ETH Zurich (2018)
- **B.Sc.** Environmental Sciences and Technology, TU Berlin (2016)

## Research Interests

Environmental migration · Climate change adaptation · Disaster risk communication · Sustainable sanitation · Air pollution · Transformative and transdisciplinary science

## Selected Awards & Funding

- ETH Zurich Career Seed Award, *Citizen Responses to Local Air Pollution Information in Bangladesh*, CHF 30,000 (2026–2027)
- PPE Young Scholars Award for Social and Institutional Change, Witten/Herdecke University (2025)
- Jury Distinction, SNSF Scientific Image Competition 2024 — *When the river breaks the land*
- Special Mention (Non-Fiction), Earth 360° Fest, BYEI — documentary *Eroding Horizons* (2024)
- SNSF PhD Scholarship, Project *Climate Risk, Land Loss, and Migration: Evidence from a Quasi-Experiment in Bangladesh* (2019–2023)
- DAAD Graduate Scholarship (2016–2018)

## Field Research

Bangladesh (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2026) · Pakistan (2026) · Malawi (2018) · South Africa (2015)

## Professional Activities

- Chair, [Wissenschaf(f)t Zukünfte e.V.](https://www.wissenschafftzukuenfte.de/) (2020–present)
- Member, Leadership Board, Global Alliance for Inter- and Transdisciplinarity (ITD Alliance) (2021–2023)
- Member, Swiss Expert Group for Citizen Science (2021–2024)
- Reviewer for *Nature Communications*, *Environmental Research Letters*, *Global Environmental Change*, *Journal of Peace Research*, and 20+ other journals

## Languages

German (native) · English (C2) · Dutch (C2) · French (C1) · Spanish (B2) · Arabic (A2) · Bangla (A1) · Hindi (A1) · Portuguese (A1)

---

*For the full list of publications, teaching, workshops, and conference presentations, please download the PDF above or visit the [Research](research.qmd) and [Teaching](teaching.qmd) pages.*
